no: potential incompatible with sorcerer variants of TnB and ToF Subtledoctor's non-cleric kit mods These can do modifications to previous kit mods, so here they go Includes Tome And Blood, Will to Power, Might and Guile. Also his mantained fork of Spellhold Studios' Refinements Tome And Blood Overlaps with Artisan's Kitpack and Talents of Faerun. The smaller components may be fine but don't go mixing the kits and more complex changes. Familiars can be made a non-liability by removing the master’s CON penalty if a familiar dies!Install Tweaks Anthology’s revised spell tables for arcane casters (PnP Sorcerer Tables and PnP Mage table...

conflicts.reason: Familiar components conflict with Innate Find Familiar

conflicts.source: Both modify familiar behavior/files with qdtnb_ prefix. Other components compatible, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: TnB cn:40 (Revised Specialists) and cn:82 (Arcanist) have potential overlap with 5E spellcasting — TnB cn:82 even warns "do not install if you plan to use 5E casting." Both TnB cn:51 (Metamagic innate) adds metamagic abilities on top of existing casting — independent of 5E's casting mechanics. TnB cn:66 (Innate Familiar) modifies CLABs/hidespl, unrelated to spellcasting system. Selected components are safe with 5E.
conflicts.myComps: #40 Revised Specialists (NOT in preset) #82 Arcanist (NOT, warns against 5E) #51 Metamagic (IN, safe) #66 Innate Familiar (IN, safe)
conflicts.source: TnB cn:82 description says do not install with 5E; cn:51 adds innate abilities independent of casting system; cn:66 is CLAB/hidespl only, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: TnB cn:40 (Revised Specialists) — would conflict with SCS spell school changes. TnB cn:51 (Metamagic innate) adds metamagic abilities (Empower, Maximize, etc.) that apply on top of whatever spell versions exist — independent of SCS spell tweaks. SCS modifies spell effects; metamagic modifies how they're cast. Install TnB before SCS.
conflicts.myComps: #40 Revised Specialists (NOT in preset) #51 Metamagic (IN, safe)
conflicts.source: Metamagic adds innate abilities independent of spell file contents; cn:40 NOT selected, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: Choose one tweak for allowing arcane casting with armor
EET Gui does not display all functions

One HIGH overlap, rest safe. TnB cn:20 (Revised Dragon Disciples) vs ToF cn:40950 (Chromatic Dragon Disciples): both modify CLABSO01.2da, SPDD02/SPDD03.spl, and the base Dragon Disciple kit. TnB adds elemental variant kits (acid/electric/cold/fire via ADD_KIT); ToF creates chromatic variants (black/green/white/blue via kit.copy). Both rewrite the base DD and create competing variants — install TnB before ToF. TnB cn:33/35 (Sylvan/Revenant Sorcerer) vs ToF cn:40925 (Bloodlines): safe — both ADD new independent kits, no shared CLAB files. TnB cn:40 (Revised Specialists) ToF cn:40750/40900 (Opposition Schools/Multi Specialist) modify kit availability, not spell mechanics — no overlap with selected TnB. Neither detects the other.
conflicts.myComps: #20 Revised Dragon Disciples (HIGH overlap) #33 #35 Sorcerer kits (safe) #40 Revised Specialists (NOT in preset)
conflicts.theirComps: #40950 Dragon Disciples (HIGH overlap) #40925 Sorcerer Bloodlines (safe) #40750 Opposition Schools #40900 Multi Specialist #1500 IWD arcane #2000 #2060 Spell tweaks
conflicts.source: Both modify CLABSO01.2da/SPDD02/SPDD03; TnB uses ADD_KIT, ToF uses kit.copy/edit; sorcerer kits are independent ADD_KITs, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: Both modify mxsplwiz.2da and mxsplsrc.2da. Last installed wins
conflicts.myComps: #11 #12 Revised Mage Spell Table #16 #17 Revised Sorcerer Spell Table
conflicts.theirComps: #2250 Sorcerer Spell Prog #2260 #2261 Mage Spell Prog

conflicts.reason: Both modify mage and sorcerer spell tables
Both provide multiclass arcane options. Install A7 after TnB so it can generate combinations from TnB kits.

sum: Sorcerer and wizard overhaul with 19 components: new kits, metamagic, spell schools, and spellcasting mechanics for arcane casters.

avoid: Too many sorcerer kits can be overwhelming
Multiclass specialists + SCS can cause edge cases
rec.tip: Pick a focused subset. Revised Metamagic and Spell Switching are the most impactful components.

ki.description: TomeAndBlood cn:85 (Sorcerer Kit: Mana Sorcerer) is author-DEPRECATED in v18. The INCLUDE file comp/setup_mana_sorcerer.tpa is missing from the mod archive, so the component may error or silently fail if selected.
ki.workaround: Do not select cn:85. If the preset has it, remove. Consider using one of the other T&B sorcerer kits (cn:25 Magus, cn:31 Favored Soul, cn:33 Sylvan Disciple, cn:35 Revenant Disciple, cn:37 Amorphous Disciple) instead.

co.n: Revised Mage Spell Table: Tome & Blood Table
Revised Sorcerer Spell Table: Tome & Blood Table
co.no: REMOVED from current version. Caused UI conflicts with EET GUI.
Revised Dragon Disciple kit. Rebalanced draconic sorcerer with scaled bonuses and breath weapon.
Sylvan Disciple sorcerer kit. Fey-blooded caster with innate non-detection, charm immunity, and enhanced spell saves. Fewer spell slots.
Revenant Disciple sorcerer kit. Undead-touched sorcerer gaining necrotic resistances and death magic.

co.n: Metamagic: Innate, learned automatically by everyone

co.no: Makes Find Familiar an innate ability instead of a spell. Hides the spell from spellbooks.

co.n: Spell Switching: Change spells every level
Spell Switching: Change spells once every three levels
co.no: Spell Switching: change memorized spells once every 3 levels without resting. QoL for prepared casters.
co.tp2n: Change spells once every three levels

co.no: Adds 3 multiclass sorcerer kits: Fighter/Sorcerer, Sorcerer/Cleric, Sorcerer/Thief. Uses semi-spontaneous casting system. Fixed 3 kit slots. Does not need late install order — creates new kits via ADD_KIT, does not patch existing ones.

co.n: Mage Kit: Arcanist (do not install if you plan to use 5E spellcasting for everyone)
co.tp2n: Mage Kit: Arcanist (do not install if you plan to use 5E spellcasting for everyone)

co.dep: v18 author-marked DEPRECATED (still installable but discouraged)

co.n: Spell Slot Items: Bonuses for both memorization and casting slots
co.no: Intended for use with Multiclass Sorcerers and Arcanist components
co.scn: Make +Spell Slot Items work with MultiSorcerers/Arcanists
co.tp2n: Bonuses for both memorization and casting slots

co.n: Spell Slot Items: Bonuses for casting slots only
co.scn: Make +Spell Slot Items work with MultiSorcerers/Arcanists

co.no: Adds 24 multiclass specialist mage kits: 8 schools (Abjurer, Conjurer, Diviner, Enchanter, Illusionist, Invoker, Necromancer, Transmuter) × 3 multiclass combos (Fighter/Mage, Cleric/Mage, Mage/Thief). MASSIVE kit cap impact — 24 slots. Uses ADD_KIT_EX, does not patch existing kits. Fixed kit count, not variable.

advisories.reason: T&B Revised Dragon Disciples (#20) rewrites the DD kit. NPC_EE components #181, #724, #102, #484, #621 assign kits to specific NPCs. If both are installed, NPC_EE may assign the unrevised DD kit version. Install T&B before NPC_EE.
advisories.source: Component-level conflict. T&B modifies kit definition; NPC_EE assigns kits to NPCs. Load order resolves, 2026-03
